case_title: PANIAGUA CONSTRUCTION, INC et al VS. IGOR PALAGIN

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT IGOR PALAGIN'S MOTION TO DISMISS APPEAL OF LABOR COMMISSIONER ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART. UNDER THE CLEAR LANGUAGE OF LABOR CODE 98.2(B), AS AMENDED IN 2010, DEFENDANT MUST POST A BOND BEFORE FILING AN APPEAL. DEFENDANT IS GIVEN 30 DAYS TO POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $34,359.32. IF THE BOND IS NOT POSTED BY 4PM ON SEPT.6, 2012 PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR EX PARTE AND HAVE THIS ACTION DISMISSED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. APPELLANTS PANIAGUA CONSTRUCTION, INC. and ALFRED MARTINEZ's Application For Release Of Undertaking Made Per To Labor Code Section 98.2 And Return Of $34,359 To Appellant is Off calendar for this department. The application should be re-calendared for hearing before Judge O'Malley-Taylor. She is currently presiding in Department 611. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Appeal Labor Commissioner Order; Memo P & A
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH C. WILSON OF WILSON/DUVAL, TEL. NO. 363-6543 APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IGOR PALAGIN.
ATTY. FRANK S. MOORE, TEL. NO. 292-6091 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT IGOR PALAGIN'S MOTION To Dismiss Appeal of Labor Commissioner Order is Granted in part. Under the clear language of Labor Code 98.2(b), as amended in 2010, Defendant must post a bond before filing an appeal. Defendant is given 30 days to post a bond in the amount of $34,359.32. If the bond is not posted by 4pm on Sept.6, 2012 Plaintiff may appear ex parte and have this action dismissed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
